name: ISO/IEC 42001
allowed_use_boundary: Use as external AI management system crosswalk evidence.
Do not treat as certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority.
claims: ISO/IEC 42001 can support AI management system comparison.
ISO/IEC 42001 can be mapped to organizational process and continual-improvement terms.
non_claims: ISO/IEC 42001 does not prove transition admissibility.
Management-system compliance does not grant execution authority.
The wiki relationship record is not acceptance of equivalence.

transition_table_mapping.allowed_use_boundary: AI management system crosswalk evidence only
transition_table_mapping.claims: AI management system, risk and opportunity management, organizational process, continual improvement
transition_table_mapping.non_claims: no admissibility proof, certification, endorsement, or execution authority
transition_table_mapping.actor_or_authority_model: external standards posture; no StegVerse authority inherited
transition_table_mapping.reconstruction_model: source plus crosswalk can reconstruct management-system relationship limits
transition_table_mapping.SPE_overlap: may inform governance boundary and policy reference, not standing determination
transition_table_mapping.StegVerse_ecosystem_overlap: Governance Boundary, Policy Reference, Triad Governance, Decision Continuity

fail_closed_conditions: any certification, endorsement, execution authority, or commit-time authority claim appears
